v.1
Lesson 7 Summary Guide
 The vendor you choose to host your email list is a HUGE
decision!
 Difficult to move your lists to another host, so it is important to
do the research and pick the one that will fit your needs best
 Recommend choosing a hosted service over self-hosting on
your server
o Gmail and other major email platforms will likely filter or
block emails coming from one IP Address (your server)
o Email simply won’t get delivered
 Bottom line…it’s essential your emails get delivered and in a
timely manner
 Highly recommend a hosted solution, like Profollow.com
o Profollow.com is our private label version of Aweber.com
(the most popular and reliable list host on the web)
o Review the Profollow start-up guide in the “Downloads”
area
